  method={"post"}
  path={"/v1/dns-lookup/txt/batch"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



DNS lookup for txt record type for a list of domains

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

  parameters={[]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"required":true,"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"maxAgeMs":{"type":"number","example":5000,"description":"The maximum age of the cache in milliseconds [0]-fetch dns, [-1]-from cache"},"domains":{"example":["example.com","example.org"],"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"}}},"required":["domains"],"title":"TxtBatchRecordsRequest"}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"domain":{"type":"string","nullable":false,"description":"The domain name of the TXT record.","example":"example.com"},"raw":{"nullable":false,"description":"The raw TXT records.","example":[["v=spf1 include:_spf.google.com","~all"],["google-site-verification=abcdef12345"]],"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"}},"object":{"description":"The parsed TXT record object.","allOf":[{"type":"object","properties":{"records":{"nullable":false,"description":"The raw TXT records.","example":[["v=spf1 include:_spf.google.com","~all"],["google-site-verification=abcdef12345"]],"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"}}},"required":["records"],"title":"TxtRecordObject"}]},"validation":{"description":"The validation of the TXT record.","allOf":[{"type":"object","properties":{"errors":{"description":"The validation messages for the DNS record.","type":"array","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"key":{"type":"string","description":"The key of the validation message."},"message":{"type":"string","description":"The description of the validation."}},"required":["key","message"],"title":"ValidationMessage"}},"warnings":{"description":"The warning messages for the DNS record.","type":"array","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"key":{"type":"string","description":"The key of the validation message."},"message":{"type":"string","description":"The description of the validation."}},"required":["key","message"],"title":"ValidationMessage"}},"info":{"description":"The info messages for the DNS record.","type":"array","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"key":{"type":"string","description":"The key of the validation message."},"message":{"type":"string","description":"The description of the validation."}},"required":["key","message"],"title":"ValidationMessage"}}},"required":["errors","warnings","info"],"title":"DnsValidationResult"}]},"queryStatus":{"example":"SUCCESS","type":"string","description":"The status of the BIMI TXT record.","enum":["SUCCESS","NODATA","NOTFOUND","TIMEOUT","ERROR","SERVFAIL","NXDOMAIN"],"title":"DnsRecordStatus"},"timestamp":{"type":"number","description":"The timestamp of the TXT record lookup.","example":1704067200000}},"required":["domain","raw","object","validation","queryStatus","timestamp"],"title":"TxtRecord"}}}}},"400":{"description":"Bad Request"},"404":{"description":"Not Found"},"422":{"description":"Unprocessable Entity"}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
